title: Gnometheon scales with Gnome cards in hand and under source

card.rawText: Gain +1 Atk Dice Rolls and +1 Modifier for each "Gnome" named card in your hand. Gnomes sacrificed to summon this card are placed under it and count as cards in your hand. If this card leaves the field or changes control, the cards under follow it.

effect.value: Gain +1 Atk Dice Rolls and +1 Modifier for each "Gnome" named card in your hand. Gnomes sacrificed to summon this card are placed under it and count as cards in your hand. If this card leaves the field or changes control, the cards under follow it.
